items.title: Factoring in the reported contracts for John Collins, Kevin Huerter & Javonte Green and the Gary Harris/Taurean Prince acquisitions, I've got the Pistons at about $42.8M under the luxury tax.
items.author: KeithSmithNBA
items.body_excerpt:
Factoring in the reported contracts for John Collins, Kevin Huerter & Javonte Green and the Gary Harris/Taurean Prince acquisitions, I've got the Pistons at about $42.8M under the luxury tax.

That's enough room to give Jalen Duren a 25% of the cap max without going into the tax.

items.title: Detroit Pistons after re-signing Javonte Green.
items.author: Yossi Gozlan
items.body_excerpt:
Detroit Pistons after re-signing Javonte Green.

$34M below the luxury tax line, which they won't exceed this season.

They could give Jalen Duren a starting salary in the low $30M range and a contract that mostly mirrors and slightly exceeds Walker Kessler's $130M over 4 years.

media.title: Javonte Green to re-sign with Pistons on one-year contract
media.description: Javonte Green, who turns 33 on July 23, was only Detroit Pistons player to appear in all 82 regular-season games last season and averaged 6.9 points.

items.title: Javonte Green to re-sign with Pistons on one-year contract
items.author: Yahoo Sports
items.body_excerpt: Javonte Green to re-sign with Pistons on one-year contract Yahoo Sports

items.title: Free agent forward Javonte Green has agreed to a one-year, $3.95 million deal to return to the Detroit Pistons, sources tell ESPN. Green played all 82 games for the Pistons a season ago, averaging 6.9 points, 17.6 minutes and 38.1% 3-point shooting.
items.author: Shams Charania Tweets
items.body_excerpt: Free agent forward Javonte Green has agreed to a one-year, $3.95 million deal to return to the Detroit Pistons, sources tell ESPN. Green played all 82 games for the Pistons a season ago, averaging 6.9 points, 17.6 minutes and 38.1% 3-point shooting.

items.title: Javonte Green was the finishing touch on the Pistons roster. The fit was obvious, but the rotation spot was not. Green wound up playing all 82 games and earned his every minute.
items.author: Keith Langlois
items.body_excerpt:
Javonte Green was the finishing touch on the Pistons roster. The fit was obvious, but the rotation spot was not. Green wound up playing all 82 games and earned his every minute.

www.nba.com/pistons/news...

media.title: Pistons 2025-26 Rewind: Pistons found great value, ideal fit in Green
media.description: Green’s toughness, defensive tools and athleticism checked every box for Trajan Langdon and J.B. Bickerstaff’s vision for the Pistons.
